basic_details.job_title: Nagaland University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Nagaland University JRF Recruitment 2026 has been announced! Applications are invited for the position of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in a research project funded by the Advanced Research Grant (ARG) Program of Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF), Govt. of India. The Walk-in-Interview is scheduled on 23rd July 2026. Find all details about the Nagaland University JRF vacancy 2026, including eligibility, fellowship, and application process here.

important_dates.venue: Conference Hall, Administrative Block, School of Agricultural Sciences, Nagaland University, Medziphema Campus

age_limit.age_details: Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF) – Advanced Research Grant (ARG) Program

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D or M.E./ M.Tech/ M.S./ M.Sc (with NET) in Processing and Food Engineering / Agricultural and Food Engg / Food Engg / Food Technology from a recognized University/Institute. Minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG.

how_to_apply: Application form may be downloaded from Nagaland University website and submitted via email to **[email protected]** latest by **21 July 2026 till 5:00 PM**. Shortlisted candidates will be notified via email for the Walk-in-Interview.
important_instructions: The appointment is purely temporary and contractual. Initially for 1 year, renewable every year based on satisfactory performance. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must bring original documents at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: Nagaland University JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: School of Agricultural Sciences, Nagaland University, Medziphema has invited applications from Indian nationals to work as a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in the ANRF-ARG funded project entitled “Design and Development of a Smart Fermentation Cabinet for Bamboo Shoot: Preserving Traditional Food Practices in Nagaland”. Download Nagaland University JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

rows.nagaland_university_a_central_university: Design and Development of a Smart Fermentation Cabinet for Bamboo Shoot: Preserving Traditional Food Practices in Nagaland
Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF) – Advanced Research Grant (ARG) Program
Three (3) Years or till the completion of the project

content_sections.heading: Nagaland University JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date: Conference Hall, Administrative Block, School of Agricultural Sciences, Nagaland University, Medziphema Campus

content_sections.heading: Nagaland University JRF Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Ph.D or M.E./ M.Tech/ M.S./ M.Sc (with NET) in Processing and Food Engineering / Agricultural and Food Engg / Food Engg / Food Technology from a recognized University/Institute. Minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG.
Published research papers in peer-reviewed/Scopus indexed/NAAS rated journals.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Nagaland University JRF 2026
content_sections.text: Application form may be downloaded from Nagaland University website and submitted via email to ** [email protected] ** latest by **21 July 2026 till 5:00 PM**. Shortlisted candidates will be notified via email for the Walk-in-Interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The appointment is purely temporary and contractual. Initially for 1 year, renewable every year based on satisfactory performance. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must bring original documents at the time of interview. faq.question: Q1. What is Nagaland University JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Nagaland University has invited applications for one Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in the ANRF-ARG funded project on “Design and Development of a Smart Fermentation Cabinet for Bamboo Shoot” at the School of Agricultural Sciences, Medziphema Campus.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Nagaland University JRF?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 21 July 2026 (till 5:00 PM) via email.

faq.question: Q3. When is the Walkin-Interview for Nagaland University JRF?
faq.answer: The Walkin-Interview is scheduled on 23 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Conference Hall, Administrative Block, School of Agricultural Sciences, Medziphema Campus.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Nagaland University JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have Ph.D or M.Tech/M.Sc (with NET) in Food Engineering / Food Technology / Processing and Food Engineering with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA. Published research papers are desirable.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for the JRF post at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: Download the application form from the university website and submit it via email to [email protected] with all required documents by 21 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent job at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: No. The position is purely temporary and contractual, initially for one year and renewable based on performance.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required during the Walk-in-Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original mark sheets, degree certificates, age proof, and other testimonials. They should arrive at least 30 minutes before the scheduled time.
